ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classification_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification system (e.g., 3A, 4A, 7, 8) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification system */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for the classification system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the classification system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification system was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the classification system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification system the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Specific criteria for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES classification_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "geographic_features" TEXT /* Geographic features of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the county */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the county record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the county record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the county record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL, AK) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the state record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the state record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the state record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being classified */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the county is classified as */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification system used */,
  "classification_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the classification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the classification record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the classification record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_classifications_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_classifications_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES classification_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_classifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the GIS data belongs to */,
  "boundary_data" TEXT /* Boundary data for the county (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Map data for the county (e.g., shapefile) */,
  "centroid" TEXT /* Centroid coordinates of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "perimeter_km" REAL /* Perimeter of the county in kilometers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the GIS data record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the GIS data record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the GIS data record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the GIS data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being classified */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the county was classified as */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification system used */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date the classification was made */,
  "classification_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the classification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the history record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_county_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the access record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the access record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_county_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_county_access_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_classification_system_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the access record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the access record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_classification_system_access_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES classification_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_classification_system_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification system */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the configuration entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_config_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES classification_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column affected */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., required, unique) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the rule */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the validation rule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the validation rule */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
